summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EasyLeaz CRM updates: SMTP configuration, appointment section removal, and CSV export functionality. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@easyleaz.ch/easyleaz2024 returns JWT token
Backend: GET /api/leads/export returns CSV with correct headers and semicolon delimiter
Backend: GET /api/leads/export?status=pending filters by status correctly
Backend: GET /api/leads/export?date_from=2026-01-01&date_to=2026-12-31 filters by date range
Backend: POST /api/leads creates leads correctly with form data
Frontend: Landing page loads WITHOUT appointment section (#rendez-vous removed)
Frontend: Hero secondary CTA changed to 'Nous contacter' and scrolls to #contact
Frontend: Admin dashboard login works with admin@easyleaz.ch/easyleaz2024
Frontend: Admin leads tab shows CSV export bar with date filters and export button
Frontend: CSV export button triggers download successfully
Frontend: Leasing form has all extended fields (birth date, address, income, etc.)
Frontend: Vehicle management accessible with 27 vehicles loaded
Frontend: CMS editor accessible with all content sections
